nodes.title: Is Amazon Project Kuiper open data?
nodes.text:
## Thread 1
Started exploring satellite-imagery datasets and whether any are openly licensed.

nodes.author: copilot
nodes.title: Licensing summary
nodes.text: Most are research-only; a few permit redistribution with attribution.
